title: Attention Is All You Need
description: The transformer paper. Start here before anything else in the LLMs subgroup.

title: GPT-4 Technical Report
description: OpenAI's writeup on scaling, capabilities, and limitations of GPT-4.

title: CLIP: Learning Transferable Visual Models
description: Contrastive vision-language pretraining. The starting point for modern VLMs.

title: Flamingo: A Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning
description: DeepMind's perceiver-resampler approach to multimodal in-context learning.

title: FreeCAD CNC tutorial series
description: End-to-end intro to generating G-code from CAD using the Path workbench.

title: F1TENTH Autonomous Racing Course
description: Free university course on perception, planning, and control for 1/10-scale racecars.

title: PX4 User Guide
description: Reference manual for PX4 autopilot — setup, tuning, and SITL.

title: MoveIt 2 tutorials
description: Motion planning, kinematics, and execution for ROS 2 manipulators.

title: DW1000 IEEE 802.15.4-2011 UWB module
description: Datasheet for the UWB transceiver used in our anchor grid.

title: Optimum Array Processing (Van Trees)
description: Standard text on beamforming and DoA estimation — chapters 8–10 are the priority.

title: Modern Robotics (Lynch & Park)
description: Free textbook + Coursera specialization. The standard introduction to kinematics, dynamics, and motion planning.

title: Space-mouse open-hardware repo
description: Reference implementation of a Hall-effect 6-DoF controller — schematics, firmware, and prints.

title: LQR for inverted pendulum (MIT 6.832 notes)
description: Linear-quadratic regulator derivation worked through on the canonical balance problem.

title: Autoware / Tier IV driving stack
description: Open-source full-stack autonomous-driving software, useful as a reference for the Go-Kart project.
